Oracle Events
OE 1: Search CRM using crm_search_companies or crm_search_deals with queries related to Catalina Dubois or her account names (or similar). Expected findings: Catalina manages NorthWind Technologies (Pam Kowalski), Canopy Health (Patricia Langford), and PivotPoint Labs (Sam Delgado); the prompt only gives first names for Patricia and Sam, so the agent must resolve them to companies via CRM or email. Tool: crm_search_companies or crm_search_deals.
OE 2: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Pam", "NorthWind", or "Denver" (or similar). Expected findings: Pam Kowalski's formal escalation to David Chen (Victor Huang cc'd on her message) demanding corrective action for Raj Patel, resolution path for Emilia Cruz, named coverage, commercial terms, and response-time expectations; PathFinder Logistics mentioned as alternate vendor; context that Catalina's April 14 recovery commitment to Pam was not followed through. Tool: search_emails.
OE 3: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Patricia", "Sam", "Canopy", "PivotPoint", "Mehta", or "Mina" (or similar). Expected findings: Patricia's Q2 wave: Dr. Kovacs (Nashville→Toronto international), Marcus Webb (Detroit→Chicago cold-chain), Tyler Okonkwo (Philadelphia→Denver storage gap); Sam's threads on Nadia Okonjo (H-1B / USCIS timing) and Diego Castañeda (CNC equipment); Patricia routing the Dr. Mehta CMO relocation to Mina Hashimoto instead of Catalina. Tool: search_emails.
OE 4: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "NorthWind", "Pam", "Emilia", "piano", "INV-2026-0412", or "recovery plan" (or similar). Expected findings: Raj Patel chain-of-custody breach (crew at 7 AM vs 9 AM escort, overnight warehouse); Emilia Cruz Steinway damage via KeyMove and open claim / callback gap; Marcus Thorne's invoice breakdown separating ~$1,200 chain-of-custody protocol (Raj IT move) from ~$2,200 specialty piano line (Emilia); David Chen's save-or-lose coordination. Tool: conversations_search_messages.
OE 5: Search CRM using crm_search_deals and crm_list_engagements for each of the three client companies (or similar). Expected findings: current deal stages and engagement notes; NorthWind CRM trail reads stale versus the live crisis. Tool: crm_search_deals, crm_list_engagements.
OE 6: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base appMoveOpsOps001, Relocations table, Company field matching NorthWind / Canopy / PivotPoint, or similar). Expected findings: active relocation rows, coordinators, move windows, special requirements; Canopy Q2 wave start dates already before "today" (2026-04-26) so Patricia-facing status is overdue. Tool: airtable_search_records.
OE 7: Search Linear using linear_list_issues with queries related to "NorthWind", "Emilia", "piano", "Kovacs", "Webb", "Okonkwo", "Nadia", or "Diego" (or similar). Expected findings: David's NorthWind retention ticket #482 (linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1); no issue scoped to Emilia's piano claim, the Kovacs/Webb/Okonkwo Q2 moves, or the PivotPoint Nadia/Diego relocations (other Canopy or engineering issues may exist). Tool: linear_list_issues.
OE 8: Look up contacts using contacts_search_contacts or crm_search_contacts for Pam Kowalski, David Chen, Victor Huang, and Catalina Dubois (or similar). Expected findings: pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com, david.chen@moveops.com, victor.huang@northwindtech.com, catalina.dubois@moveops.com. Tool: contacts_search_contacts or crm_search_contacts.
OE 9: Send recovery email using send_email from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com with david.chen@moveops.com on CC. Body must credibly address Raj Patel / chain-of-custody, Emilia Cruz / piano, and include a concrete responsiveness commitment aligned with Pam's asks, not apology-only. Tool: send_email.
OE 10: Create NorthWind CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement (company_northwind or equivalent) summarizing Pam escalation, incidents, PathFinder risk, and broken recovery-plan expectation for leadership visibility. Tool: crm_create_engagement.
OE 11: Create Canopy Health CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement (company_canopy or equivalent) summarizing Q2 wave status, overdue confirmations, and Mehta routing signal if discovered. Tool: crm_create_engagement.
OE 12: Create PivotPoint Labs CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement (company_pivot or equivalent) summarizing Nadia and Diego relocation risks (visa, equipment). Tool: crm_create_engagement.
OE 13: Create a Linear issue using linear_create_issue for Emilia Cruz piano damage / claim follow-up (no existing scoped ticket). Tool: linear_create_issue.
OE 14: Create at least one Linear issue using linear_create_issue for Canopy Q2 wave tracking (Kovacs / Webb / Okonkwo; no existing scoped tickets). Tool: linear_create_issue.
OE 15: Create at least one Linear issue using linear_create_issue for PivotPoint relocations (Nadia Okonjo, Diego Castañeda; no existing scoped tickets). Tool: linear_create_issue.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
